zh.lifeSummary: 當Livida De Meriet於1069年出生在英國英格蘭布里斯托時，她的父親Merwynn Sune de Meriet19歲，母親Mrs Merwynn Sune de Meriot16歲。她於1089年與Harding FitzEadnoth在英國英格蘭布里斯托結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1110年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾惠亞爾斯特享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Livida De Meriet于1069年出生在英国英格兰布里斯托时，她的父亲Merwynn Sune de Meriet19岁，母亲Mrs Merwynn Sune de Meriot16岁。她于1089年与Harding FitzEadnoth在英国英格兰布里斯托结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1110年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾惠亞爾斯特享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meriet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Merritt
meanings: English: variant of Merriott , Marriott , or Marritt. The last of these is most often a variant of Merriott or Marriott , but possibly in some instances from Middle English Marret or Merret, a syncopated form of Margaret, Mergeret.

nameMeanings.name: Livida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In modern use often taken as a short form of Olivia , but originally a distinct name, a feminine form of the Roman family name Livius. This is of uncertain derivation, perhaps connected with lividus ‘bluish’.

en.lifeSummary: When Livida De Meriet was born in 1069, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom, her father, Merwynn Sune de Meriet, was 19 and her mother, Mrs Merwynn Sune de Meriot, was 16. She married Harding FitzEadnoth in 1089, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1110, in Wheatenhurst, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Livida De Meriet est née en 1069, à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Merwynn Sune de Meriet, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mrs Merwynn Sune de Meriot, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Harding FitzEadnoth en 1089, à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1110, à Wheatenhurst, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Livida De Meriet 1069 in Bristol, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Merwynn Sune de Meriet 19 und ihre Mutter Mrs Merwynn Sune de Meriot 16. Sie hat 1089 in Bristol, England, United Kingdom Harding FitzEadnoth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1110 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Wheatenhurst, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Livida De Meriet è nata il nel 1069 nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Merwynn Sune de Meriet, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Mrs Merwynn Sune de Meriot, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Harding FitzEadnoth nel 1089, nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1110, nel Wheatenhurst, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Livida De Merietが1069年にイギリスイギリスブリストルで生まれた時，父Merwynn Sune de Merietは19歳，母Mrs Merwynn Sune de Meriotは16歳であった。1089年にイギリスイギリスブリストルでHarding FitzEadnothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1110年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウィーテンハルストで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Livida De Meriet(이)가 1069년 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Merwynn Sune de Meriet(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Merwynn Sune de Meriot(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1089년 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 Harding FitzEadnoth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1110년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 휘텐후르스트에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Livida De Meriet nasceu em 1069, em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Merwynn Sune de Meriet, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Merwynn Sune de Meriot, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Harding FitzEadnoth em 1089, em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1110, em Wheatenhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Livida De Meriet родилась в 1069 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Merwynn Sune de Meriet было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Merwynn Sune de Meriot, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Harding FitzEadnoth в 1089 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1110 г. в местности уитенурст, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Livida De Meriet nació en 1069, en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Merwynn Sune de Meriet, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mrs Merwynn Sune de Meriot, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Harding FitzEadnoth en 1089, en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1110, en Wheatenhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
